judge_reason: Description B reads specific, structured text from stamps (e.g., 'BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION', 'MAR 1 6 1950', '518') while Description A explicitly calls the content largely illegible, creating a direct contradiction on the legibility and specific quoted text of the visual content.
original_image_tags: A single page of aged, light brown or beige paper, oriented vertically. The paper shows signs of wear, including a tattered and torn left edge. The content consists almost entirely of very faint, illegible text that appears to be a "bleed-through" or ghost image from the reverse side of the page. Two distinct stamps are visible.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Faded blank document page with stamped markings, including a circular seal at upper left, a red handwritten “518,” and an inverted “RECEIVED” stamp near the upper right.*
